channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Detroit Lions expect key reinforcements back for NFL Divisional Round vs. Commanders
item.description: The Detroit Lions are expecting to get back key reinforcements ahead of their NFL Divisional Round matchup against Jayden Daniels and his Washington Commanders.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Jannik Sinner starts his Australian Open title defense with a straight set win
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — After wasting a set point in the second tiebreaker with an ill-conceived drop shot, Jannik Sinner quickly reverted to what's been working for him and finished off a straight-set win over Nicolas Jarry to begin his Australian Open title defense.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Turning the page: Eagles receiver A.J. Brown reads inspirational book on sideline during playoff win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A.J. Brown had a novel ideal to pass time on the bench during Philadelphia's wild-card playoff game.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina puts clamps on Madison Booker, routs No. 5 Texas 67-50 for 11th straight win
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Te-Hina Paopao and Chloe Kitts each scored 11 points, and No. 2 South Carolina rolled past No. 5 Texas 67-50 for its 11th straight win on Sunday in front of a sold out crowd of 18,000 at Colonial Life Arena.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers still has 'a lot of juice left in the tank,' NFL legend Brett Favre says
item.description: NFL legend Brett Favre believes Aaron Rodgers still has some "juice" left in the tank to continue his career should he choose to forgo retirement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Friedrich pulls away for 4-man bobsled win, US finishes 3rd in team luge relay
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — Francesco Friedrich got the 85th World Cup bobsled victory of his career Sunday, dominating the second heat to win a four-man race.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inman: 10 reasons the 49ers could reach the Super Bowl at Levi’s Stadium in 2026
item.description: The 49ers went from first in the NFC to last in their division this season. They have the talent to reach those heights again after resting up this offseason.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka beats Sloane Stephens to begin her bid for a third Australian Open title
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka began her bid to become the first woman in a quarter-century to win three consecutive Australian Open titles, eliminating 2017 U.S. Open champion Sloane Stephens 6-3, 6-2 on Sunday night in just 71 minutes. Sabalenka is seeded No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Rocks finish fourth in high-powered quad meet
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team got a sense of where it stacks up early in the season against some of the top teams in the country.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nationals and Jorge López agree to $3 million, 1-year deal
item.description: The Washington Nationals and former All-Star pitcher Jorge López agreed to terms on a 1-year contract, the team announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago plays Edmonton following Teravainen's 2-goal performance
item.description: Edmonton Oilers (25-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-26-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NFL moves Vikings-Rams playoff game to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL has moved the Rams' wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in the Los Angeles area. The game will be played Monday night at State Farm Stadium, the home of the Arizona Cardinals, in suburban Glendale.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Basketball: Men get first RMAC win under Dunlap as Women cruise past NMHU
item.description: After a three-week break, Colorado Mesa Basketball is back. And they're off to a great start in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Brayden Point reaches 600 career points in Lightning's 4-1 victory over the Bruins
item.description: Brayden Point reached 600 career points with a power-play goal, Andrei Vasilevskiy made 27 saves, and the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Boston Bruins 4-1 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas Raider Charles Snowden thought he was in Florida during DUI arrest: Video
item.description: Tests showed Snowden’s blood-alcohol level was more than double the legal limit after officers found him asleep and unresponsive in a running SUV, documents show.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation

item.title: Lakers game postponed Thursday; coach JJ Redick reportedly loses home in Palisades Fire
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers game against the Charlotte Hornets scheduled for Thursday evening has been postponed as the community reels from the devastating fires throughout the city. The team announced the postponement on X on Thursday, stating that it'll be rescheduled to "focus on what matters most.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: 6 Bulls earn CSC Academic All-District honors
item.description: The University of South Florida football program had six student-athletes earn recognition on the 2024 Academic All-District Football Team.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF Associate AD, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Raiders fire coach Antonio Pierce after he goes 4-13 in lone full season
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Antonio Pierce stood behind a lectern and took questions during an end-of-season news conference, even though his future as the Las Vegas Raiders' coach remained very much in question.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Zuckerberg taps UFC President Dana White for Meta's board of directors
item.description: (KRON) -- Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg rings in the new year with several major personnel announcements. Three high-profile individuals have been named to join Meta's board of directors, including one of the most prominent figures in sports.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
